snippet.title: Naanga Naalu Peru - Video Song | Karuppu | Suriya | RJ Balaji | @SaiAbhyankkar| Dream Warrior
snippet.description:
Here's the Video Song of "Naanga Naalu Peru" from "Karuppu", Sung by Silambarasan TR, Sai Abhyankkar & Asal Kolaar, Lyrics Written by Asal Kolaar & Arun Srinivasan, Music Composed by Sai Abhyankkar.

Song Credits:

Song Name : Naanga Naalu Peru  
Movie : Karuppu
Composed, Arranged & Programmed by @SaiAbhyankkar 
Singers : Silambarasan TR, @SaiAbhyankkar , Asal Kolaar  
Lyrics : Asal Kolaar, Arun Srinivasan  
Synth, Keys, Bass, Rhythm by @SaiAbhyankkar 
Trumpets : Rakesh  
Shennai : Pandit Dr S Ballesh Bhajantri  
Mixed by Sai Abhyankkar at Yolo Rechords  
Mastered by Rupendar Venkatesh at Yolo Rechords  
All Recorded and Produced at Yolo Rechords, Chennai  
Creative Consultant : Adesh Krishna

Movie Credits :

Cast : Suriya, Trisha, Indrans, Natty, Mansoor Ali Khan, Swasika, Sshivadha, Anagha Maya Ravi, Supreeth Reddy and Others

snippet.title: [HINDI] BMPS 2026 | LAST CHANCE | Day 1 #BGMILIVE
snippet.description:
Download BGMI now: https://bgmi.go.link/2w5kg

The BMPS 2026 Last Chance stage begins!

16 teams who narrowly missed out on direct qualification now have one final opportunity to keep their Grand Finals dreams alive.

With just 2 Grand Finals spots up for grabs, every match carries massive stakes. One strong performance can change everything, while one mistake could bring a team's BMPS 2026 journey to an end.

Expect fearless fights, clutch moments, and all-out action as teams battle for one last shot at glory 🔥

💰 Total Prize Pool: ₹4Cr

Map Rotation
Match ⚔️1 : Rondo
Match ⚔️2 : Erangel
Match ⚔️3 : Erangel
Match ⚔️4 : Erangel
Match ⚔️5 : Miramar
Match ⚔️6 : Miramar

snippet.title: Welcome To The Jungle - Official Trailer | In Cinemas 26th June
snippet.description:
Film? Bilkul Fake! Danger? Ekdum Real! Survival Skills? Zero!

Tension out, jungle madness in! Welcome To The Jungle where the mission is unpredictable, the madness is nonstop, and the chaos has a wild side!

snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Teaser | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby | Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

► Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!
► YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

🎬 Movie Credits:
Movie: Alpha
Starring: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol
Director: Shiv Rawail
Producer: Aditya Chopra
Co-Producer: Akshaye Widhani
Screenplay: Soumil Shukla, Shridhar Raghavan
Director of Photography: Rubais
Music: Rohansh & Abeer 
Lyrics: Kumaar, Anvitaa Dutt, Kausar Munir, Rohansh & Abeer
Dialogues: Ishita Moitra
Story: Uday Chopra
Associate Producer: Rishabh Chopra
Executive Producer: Padam Bhushan
Editor: Aarif Sheikh
Production Designers: Subrata Chakraborty, Amit Ray
Action Directors: Craig Macrae, Sunil Rodrigues (ROD)
Sound: Ganesh Gangadharan, Debasish Mishra
Background Music: Sanchit Balhara, Ankit Balhara
Costume Designers: Aki Narula, Natasha Vohra, Deepali Singh Raseen, Gunpreet Kaur Mann 
Director of Choreography: Vijay Ganguly, Bosco Leslie Martis
Visual Effects Studio: yFX
Casting Director: Shanoo Sharma
Trailers & Promos: Mohit Sajnaney
Release Date: 3rd July 2026

Stay in the filmy loop:
► Like us on Facebook: Facebook/yrf
► Follow us on X: x.com/yrf
► Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf
► Visit us on: yashrajfilms.com

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

en-GB.description:
Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

snippet.title: Mohammad Faiz – Eyes (Official Video) | Starring Akanksha Choudhary
snippet.description:
Eyes is an R&B Trap and Rajasthani Pop song that fuses modern sounds with Rajasthani roots. A story of love, attraction, and the emotions hidden behind a glance, the song captures what words often cannot express. 


Audio Credits :

Singing, composition and Lyrics - Mohammad Faiz 
Music - Hiten
Mix and Master - Hiten
Guitars - Saby
Recording engineer - Mrigank

Starring - Akanksha Choudhary 

Video Credits :

Director - Mohammad Faiz 
DOP, Creative Director - Arshad Khan
First AD - Sahiba Khan
Ad - Shahrukh khan
Editor, DI - Inkblaze Studios
VFX - Harshit 
Producer - Mohammad Faiz 
Project Manager - Prateek Ramawat 
Costume designers - Faiz, Sahiba Khan and FilAishé 
Rajasthani fabrics - Abdulla Fabrics 
LP - Shahrukh khan
Production - Everest Studios
Production manager - Ankur Tanwar
Asst. Production manager - Jatin Aman
Gaffer - Subhash Kumar
Hair - Azrudin 
Make up - Dhanwantari Swami 
BTS - Manoj Ramawat and Kamal khaj
Security - Murli Manohar
Dressman - Jitesh Kumar
Tailor - Udaykant mandal
Spot - Team Kamal
Lights - Light camera aktion and Shreeji lights
Lighting team - Sushil Sahu, Nitish, Raj, Virendar, Hemanth, Ravi and Rahul
Artwork - The Visuals Vague





Lyrics : 

Kai Raatan di tu jagaa
Heartbeat bhi di tu bhaga
Meri zindagi ma ab to
Maalum ha mhane ke laga 
chaand chaar devagi
Teri ankhya do
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Atto pyaar devagi
Teri ankhya do
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Atto pyaar devagi…

Mhane maar devagi…
Atto pyaar devagi…
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do 
Atto pyaar devagi…

Tane soch, tere liye saaro gaaya jaave shehar
Teri sunke awaaz hi surilo pad gyo
Jaipur na bhi kargi gulabi chhori
Tane dekh saaro jodhpur neelo pad gyo

Koi sachoge bhi koni aiso kaam krdyuń
Tera qadma ka nicha saaro gaam krdyuń
Bol aaj hi miladyuń tana maa sa meri
Mera ghar haali chaabya tera naam krdyuń

Ab koni hova ha sabar
Aake puch la meri khabar
Dil sach mero keva ha agar
Mera har ek birthday par
Uphaar devagi
Teri ankhya do
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Atto pyaar devagi
Teri ankhya do
Mhane maar devagi…

Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Atto pyaar devagi
Teri ankhya do
Mhane maar devagi…

Mhane maar devagi…
Atto pyaar devagi…
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Atto Pyaar devagi…

Translation :

You've kept me awake through countless nights,And set my heartbeat racing wild.
Now in my life, I've finally realized,What true love feels like.
Your two eyes will light up my world,Like moonlight blessing every corner.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Thinking of you set the whole city singing,Your voice made every melody sweeter.
You made even Jaipur blush a deeper pink, girl,And one look at you turned all of Jodhpur blue.
No one would believe I'd go this far,I'd lay the whole city at your feet.
Say the word, I'll introduce you to my mother today,I'll hand you my home's keys in your hand.
I can no longer be patient,Come and ask how I've been.
If my heart truly speaks the truth,Then on every birthday of mine,
Your two eyes will be the gift,I wait to receive each year.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.

bn.title: ধামাল 4 ট্রেলার • প্রতিক্রিয়া
bn.description:
#ধামাল৪ #দ্যপিজে #পিজেএক্সপ্লেইনড

আমার সোশ্যাল মিডিয়া হ্যান্ডেলগুলো: 
ইনস্টাগ্রাম: https://www.instagram.com/pjexplained/
টুইটার: https://twitter.com/pjexplained/
স্ন্যাপচ্যাট: https://www.snapchat.com/add/pjexplained

থ্রেডস: https://www.threads.net/@pjexplained 
ফেসবুক: https://www.facebook.com/pjexplained/
হোয়াটসঅ্যাপ: https://shorturl.at/vQxpU

thePJ হলো একটি ওয়েব চ্যানেল, যার উদ্দেশ্য হলো চলচ্চিত্র পর্যালোচনা, সাক্ষাৎকার, আলোচনা, ভিডিও প্রবন্ধ এবং বিশ্লেষণধর্মী সংকলনের মাধ্যমে সিনেমার প্রচার করা। এর প্রধান উদ্দেশ্য হলো সিনেমার বিষয়ে তথ্যসমৃদ্ধ আলোচনা, সমালোচনা এবং পর্যালোচনাকে উৎসাহিত করা এবং এই উদ্দেশ্যে অনুষ্ঠানগুলোতে চলচ্চিত্র, শব্দ রেকর্ডিং এবং আলোকচিত্রের সংক্ষিপ্ত অংশ ব্যবহার করা হয়। এই ক্লিপ এবং অংশবিশেষগুলো খুবই সামান্য এবং এর ব্যবহার কপিরাইটের মালিকদের দ্বারা সম্পূর্ণ কাজটির বাণিজ্যিক ব্যবহারে কোনোভাবেই হস্তক্ষেপ করার উদ্দেশ্যে নয়। কাজগুলোর ব্যবহার কপিরাইট আইনের ৫২ ধারার অধীনে প্রদত্ত ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের ব্যতিক্রমের সাথে সঙ্গতিপূর্ণ, এবং আমরা সমালোচনা ও পর্যালোচনার জন্য প্রদত্ত ব্যতিক্রমের অধীনে কাজগুলো ব্যবহারের দাবি করি।

bn.title: APEX #1 ডমিনেশন! | ABZLOBSTER অন ফায়ার 🔥
bn.description:
📷 ইনস্টাগ্রাম - https://www.instagram.com/mrspike10/

ডিসকর্ডে আমাকে অনুসরণ করুন 👇
https://discord.com/invite/2pejjUbCKj

▶️ দ্বিতীয় চ্যানেল - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCasVrVp-Lr0ynmxFeXRG3oQ

📧mrspikeinquiry@gmail.com

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖

✅কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের" অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে। ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে। অলাভজনক, শিক্ষামূলক বা ব্যক্তিগত ব্যবহারের ক্ষেত্রে ফেয়ার ইউজের (ন্যায্য ব্যবহার) পাল্লা ভারী থাকে।

✅ভিডিও গেম ডিসক্লেইমার: এই ভিডিওর বিষয়বস্তু শুধুমাত্র শিক্ষামূলক ব্যবহারের জন্য। গেমপ্লেটি হলো Battlegrounds Mobile India (BGMI) নামক একটি ভিডিও গেম এবং এটি একটি কাল্পনিক সৃষ্টি।

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖
✅যারা আমার ভিডিও দেখেন, লাইক, শেয়ার এবং কমেন্ট করেন, তাদের সবাইকে অসংখ্য ধন্যবাদ। আপনাদের কাছে এটি হয়তো একটি ছোট বিষয় মনে হতে পারে, কিন্তু আমি আপনাদের প্রত্যেককে আন্তরিকভাবে ধন্যবাদ জানাই। আপনাদের দেওয়া সমস্ত মতামত এবং মন্তব্যই আমাদের চ্যানেলকে আজকের এই পর্যায়ে নিয়ে আসতে সাহায্য করেছে।
তাই আবারও, আপনাদের সবাইকে অসংখ্য ধন্যবাদ!!! 😍

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖

snippet.title: Gram Chikitsalay Season 2 - Official Trailer | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Gram Chikitsalay Season 2 Official Trailer 
Starring Amol Parashar, Vinay Pathak, Akansha Ranjan Kapoor, Anandeshwar Dwivedi, Akash Makhija, Garima Vikrant Singh, Dinesh Lal Yadav
A TVF Creation
Produced by Arunabh Kumar
Created by Deepak Kumar Mishra, Arunabh Kumar
Directed by Lalitam Anand
Written by Vaibhav-Shreya
Co-Produced by Vijay Koshy

Official Release Date - June 23, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
The young, idealistic and brilliant Dr. Prabhat, takes charge of a neglected Primary Health Centre in a North India Village hoping to bring about much needed changes only to realise it is he who will have to change before anything else.      

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.title: Rao Bahadur Official Teaser | Satya Dev | Venkatesh Maha | GMB | SriChakraas | A+S
snippet.description:
Rao Bahadur is a psychological drama set against the backdrop of a fading aristocracy - Made in Telugu, for the world.
 
Directed by acclaimed filmmaker Venkatesh Maha and starring the versatile Satya Dev as Rao Bahadur, the film is presented by Superstar Mahesh Babu & Namrata Shirodkar’s GMB Entertainment and produced by A+S Movies and SriChakraas Entertainments.

In Cinemas worldwide from 𝟑𝐫𝐝 𝐉𝐔𝐋𝐘 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟔. 

#RaoBahadurOnJuly3rd

Genre - Psychological Drama, Suspense, Dark Comedy, Magical Realism.
 
Cast and Crew Details:
 
Cast - Satya Dev, Vikas Muppala, Deepa Thomas, Bala Parasar, Anand Bharathi, Pranay Vaka, Kunal Kaushik, Master Kiran and others.
 
Presented by - GMB Entertainment
Banners - SriChakraas Entertainments, A+S Movies, Mahayana Motion Pictures
Producers - Chinta Gopalakrishna Reddy, Anurag Reddy, Sharath Chandra
Writer, Director & Editor - Venkatesh Maha
Executive Producer - Dinesh Yadav Bolleboina
Cinematographer - Kartik Parmar
Music - Smaran Sai
Production Designer - Rohan Singh
Costume Designer - Shilpa GNS
Sound Designer - Ashwin Rajashekar
Sound Mixing - Aravind Menon
DI - Sriprasad Sahoo
VFX Supervisor - Ramji Dott
Publicity Designer - YellowTooths
Marketing: First Show
PRO - Vamsi-Shekar
Prosthetic Make-up - Aratrika Das
Hair Stylist - Lucky Saikia
Associate Editor- Raghunath Kasireddy
Line Producer - Naveen Patel
Head of Production: Sriram MV (A+S Movies)
Head of Commercials: Sravanthi Reddy (A+S Movies)
Production Manager - Konda Jagan Mohan Reddy
Production Intern - Suma Kutti
Cinematography Team - Shubham Rohra, Vikash Kumar, Sohail Shekh
First Assistant Director - Rajesh Katta
Direction Team - Vikram Ojas Udbhav, Keshav Kumar Pashikanti, Praneeth Araka, Jayashree Chadal, Venkatesh Muddam

snippet.title: Tere Ishq Mein Naachenge - Raja Hindustani | Aamir Khan, Karisma Kapoor | Kumar Sanu | Sad Love Song
snippet.description:

Lyricist: Sameer

Director: Dharmesh Darshan

Song Lyrics:
Uff Kya Raat Aayi Hai
Mohabbat Rang Layi Hai
Dum Dum Dooba Dooba Dooba Dooba Dum Dum Dooba Dooba… (2)
Uff Kya Raat Aayi Hai Mohabbat Rang Layi Hai
Hum Jashn Manayenge Sagar Chalkayenge
Na Hosh Mein Aayenge
Tere Ishq Mein Naachenge… (4)
Tere Ishq Mein Naachenge
Jhumenge Gayenge
Hum Toh Lutt Jayenge
Tere Ishq Mein Naachenge… (4)
Ho…

Hum Jashn Manayenge Sagar Chalkayenge
Na Hosh Mein Aayenge

Tune Tadpaya Hai
Tujhko Tadpayenge
Tujhko Tadpayenge

Dum Dum Dooba Dooba Dooba Dooba Dum Dum Dooba Dooba… (2)
Galon Ki Laali Hai Tere Liye
Honthon Ki Pyali Hai Tere Liye
Galon Ki Laali Hai Tere Liye
Honthon Ki Pyali Hai Tere Liye

Ho Dil Chahiye Dilruba Chahiye
Itna Bata Tujhko Kya Chahiye
Yeh Husn Ki Jaagire
Hum Tujhpe Lutayenge
Tujhe Dil Mein Basayenge
Tere Ishq Mein Naachenge… (4)
Uff Kya Raat Aayi Hai Mohabbat Rang Layi Hai
Teri Tijori Ka Sona Nahi
Dil Hai Hamara Khilona Nahi
Ho Teri Tijori Ka Sona Nahi
Dil Hai Hamara Khilona Nahi
Kaise Kharidoge Tum Pyar Mein
Bikte Nahi Dil Yeh Bazaar Mein
Woh Cheez Nahi Hai Hum
Jo Yun Bik Jayenge
Hum Toh Takrayenge
Tere Ishq Mein Naachenge… (4)
Uff Kya Raat Aayi Hai Mohabbat Rang Layi Hai

ਦੇਖਣ ਲਈ ਧੰਨਵਾਦ। ਇਹ ਵੀਡੀਓ 13 ਜੂਨ, 2026 ਨੂੰ EA Sports FC26 Ultra hd ਗੇਮਪਲੇ ਵਿੱਚ ਅਮਰੀਕਾ ਬਨਾਮ ਪੈਰਾਗੁਏ ਵਿਚਕਾਰ ਅੰਤਰਰਾਸ਼ਟਰੀ ਫੀਫਾ ਵਿਸ਼ਵ ਕੱਪ 2026 ਗਰੁੱਪ ਸਟੇਜ ਹਾਈ ਡੈਫੀਨੇਸ਼ਨ ਫੁੱਟਬਾਲ ਸ਼ੋਅਡਾਊਨ ਦਾ ਵੇਰਵਾ ਦਿੰਦਾ ਹੈ। ਜੇਕਰ ਤੁਹਾਨੂੰ ਗੇਮਿੰਗ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਪਸੰਦ ਹੈ ਤਾਂ ਮੇਰੇ ਚੈਨਲ ਨੂੰ ਲਾਈਕ/ਸ਼ੇਅਰ ਅਤੇ ਸਬਸਕ੍ਰਾਈਬ ਕਰਨਾ ਨਾ ਭੁੱਲੋ। ਬਹੁਤ ਬਹੁਤ ਧੰਨਵਾਦ।

te.title: జూన్ 13, 2026 | USA v పరాగ్వే | FIFA వరల్డ్ కప్ 26 | గ్రూప్ స్టేజ్ మ్యాచ్ | FC26 గేమ్‌ప్లే
te.description:
✅ హాయ్ ఫ్రెండ్స్,

చూసినందుకు ధన్యవాదాలు. ఈ వీడియో, జూన్ 13, 2026న EA Sports FC26 అల్ట్రా హెచ్‌డి గేమ్‌ప్లేలో USA మరియు పరాగ్వే మధ్య జరిగిన అంతర్జాతీయ FIFA ప్రపంచ కప్ 2026 గ్రూప్ స్టేజ్ హై డెఫినిషన్ ఫుట్‌బాల్ షోడౌన్‌ను వివరిస్తుంది. మీకు ఈ గేమింగ్ వీడియో నచ్చితే, మాతో కనెక్ట్ అయి ఉండండి, నా ఛానెల్‌ను లైక్/షేర్ & సబ్స్క్రైబ్ చేయడం మర్చిపోకండి. చాలా చాలా ధన్యవాదాలు.

ta.description:
✅ வணக்கம் நண்பர்களே,
பார்த்ததற்கு நன்றி. இந்த வீடியோவில், EA Sports FC26 அல்ட்ரா எச்டி கேம்ப்ளேவில், ஜூன் 13, 2026 அன்று அமெரிக்கா மற்றும் பராகுவே அணிகளுக்கு இடையே நடைபெறும் சர்வதேச FIFA உலகக் கோப்பை 2026 குழு நிலை ஹை-டெஃபனிஷன் கால்பந்துப் போட்டி விவரிக்கப்பட்டுள்ளது. இந்த கேமிங் வீடியோ உங்களுக்குப் பிடித்திருந்தால், எனது சேனலுடன் இணைந்திருங்கள், லைக்/ஷேர் மற்றும் சப்ஸ்கிரைப் செய்ய மறக்காதீர்கள். மிக்க நன்றி.

ভিডিওটি দেখার জন্য ধন্যবাদ। এই ভিডিওতে EA Sports FC26 আল্ট্রা এইচডি গেমপ্লেতে ২০২৬ সালের ১৩ই জুন অনুষ্ঠিত আন্তর্জাতিক ফিফা বিশ্বকাপ ২০২৬ গ্রুপ পর্বের যুক্তরাষ্ট্র বনাম প্যারাগুয়ের মধ্যকার হাই ডেফিনিশন ফুটবল ম্যাচটি বিস্তারিতভাবে দেখানো হয়েছে। গেমিং ভিডিওটি ভালো লাগলে আমার সাথে যুক্ত থাকুন এবং লাইক/শেয়ার ও আমার চ্যানেলটি সাবস্ক্রাইব করতে ভুলবেন না। অনেক অনেক ধন্যবাদ।

ml.description:
✅ ഹായ് ഫ്രണ്ട്‌സ്,
കണ്ടതിന് നന്ദി. ഈ വീഡിയോയുടെ വിശദവിവരം 2026 ജൂൺ 13-ന് നടക്കുന്ന ഇന്റർനാഷണൽ ഫിഫ വേൾഡ് കപ്പ് 2026 ഗ്രൂപ്പ് സ്റ്റേജ് ഹൈ ഡെഫനിഷൻ ഫുട്ബോൾ ഷോഡൗണാണ്. ഇഎ സ്പോർട്സ് എഫ്‌സി26 അൾട്രാ എച്ച്ഡി ഗെയിംപ്ലേയിൽ യുഎസ്എയും പരാഗ്വേയും തമ്മിൽ. ഗെയിമിംഗ് വീഡിയോ ഇഷ്ടപ്പെട്ടെങ്കിൽ കണക്റ്റുചെയ്‌തിരിക്കുക, എന്റെ ചാനൽ ലൈക്ക്/ഷെയർ & സബ്‌സ്‌ക്രൈബ് ചെയ്യാൻ മറക്കരുത്. വളരെ നന്ദി.

snippet.title: Banaste Dakila Gaja | ବନସ୍ତେ ଡାକିଲା ଗଜ | Traditional Raja Song 2026 | Namita Agrawal
snippet.description:
ବର୍ଷା ଭିଜା ମାଟିର ପହିଲି ମହକ ଆଉ ଆକାଶରେ ମେଘମାଳାର ଲୁଚକାଳି ଖେଳ ସାଙ୍ଗକୁ ଯେତେବେଳେ କାନରେ ପଡ଼େ "ବନସ୍ତେ ଡାକିଲା ଗଜ...", ସେତେବେଳେ ଦେହରେ ଏକ ଅଦ୍ଭୁତ ଶିହରଣ ଖେଳିଯାଏ। ଏହି ଗୀତ ବାଜିଲେ ବୟସର ସୀମା ଡେଇଁ ପ୍ରତିଟି ମଣିଷ ପୁଣିଥରେ ପିଲା ପାଲଟିଯାଏ। ନୂଆ ଡ୍ରେସ୍, ପାଦରେ ଅଳତା, ହାତରେ ମେହେନ୍ଦୀ ଆଉ ସାଙ୍ଗମାନଙ୍କ ସହ ଦୋଳି ପାଇଁ ଝଗଡ଼ା— ଆମ ଓଡ଼ିଆ ସଂସ୍କୃତିର ସେହି ନିଆରା ପରମ୍ପରାକୁ ନମିତା ଅଗ୍ରୱାଲଙ୍କ ସୁମଧୁର ଏବଂ ଦରଦଭରା କଣ୍ଠ ଅମର କରିଦେଇଛି।

#BanasteDakilaGaja #NamitaAgrawal #TraditionalRajaSong #RajaSpecial2026 #OdiaRajaSong #RajaParba #RajoDoli #OdiaCulture #OdishaFestivals #OdiaJhia #EvergreenOdiaSong

Song : Banaste Dakila Gaja
Singer : Namita Agrawal
Album : Banaste Dakila Gaja
Album No : SM- 10487
Lyrics : Traditional
Music : Sarthak Agrawal
Music Label : Sidharth Music
Producer : Sitaram Agrawal & Namita Agrawal

snippet.title: [HI] FFMAI 2026 Summer | South Asia Play-Ins Day 2 | Group B - C
snippet.description:
Free Fire Max Asia Invitational 2026 Summer continues with the South Asia Play-Ins, featuring top teams from India, Bangladesh, Nepal, and Pakistan.

Day 2 of SA Play-Ins: GROUP B vs GROUP C

The top 8 teams from SA Play-Ins will qualify to the Main Event on June 18

Group B
♦ GodLike Esports (IN)
♦ Nebula Esports (IN)
♦ Revenant XSpark (IN)
♦ Straw Hats (BD)
♦ Flame Esports (BD)
♦ Hotshot Esports (PK)

Group C
♦ Raiders United (IN)
♦ iQOO Total Gaming (IN)
♦ No Rules (BD)
♦ Extreme EX (BD)
♦ Tonde Nepal Esports (NP)
♦ Total Winner (PK)

Schedule 📋
📅 SA Play-Ins - June 12, 13, 14
📅 Main Event Group Stage - June 18, 19, 20
📅 Grand Finals - June 21

Who will be the champion of Asia? Who will be Crowned By Fire?

#FFMAI2026 #FFM #CrownedByFire

snippet.title: Heart of the Beast | Official Trailer (2026 Movie) - Brad Pitt, J.K. Simmons, Anna Lambe
snippet.description:
It’s not who you live for… It’s who you’d die for. Watch Brad Pitt in the new trailer for David Ayer’s #HeartOfTheBeast - only in theatres September 25th. 

After a harrowing plane crash, Special Forces officer James Belmont (Brad Pitt) and his combat dog, Odin, find themselves stranded deep in the Alaskan wilderness. Together, they are forced into a brutal fight for survival against the elements. From acclaimed filmmaker David Ayer, Heart of the Beast is an intense adventure thriller that explores the unbreakable bond between a man and his best friend as they face their greatest battle yet.

Connect with #HeartOfTheBeast
Website: heartofthebeastmovie.com 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/heartofthebeast/?hl=en
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/heartofthebeast
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@heartofthebeastmovie
Threads: https://www.threads.com/@heartofthebeast
X: https://x.com/heartofthebeast

Paramount Pictures Corporation (PPC), a global producer and distributor of filmed entertainment, is a unit of Paramount, a Skydance Corporation (NASDAQ: PSKY), a leading next-generation global media and entertainment company comprised of three business segments: Filmed Entertainment, Direct-to-Consumer, and TV Media. Paramount Pictures has some of the most powerful brands in filmed entertainment, including Paramount Pictures and Paramount Animation. PPC operations also include Paramount Home Entertainment, Paramount Pictures International, Paramount Licensing Inc., and Paramount Studio Group.

snippet.title: Deewana | Official Trailer | Harshith, Smeha | Geetha Arts | V Studios | Arha Media | Sreekanth
snippet.description:
Presenting the Official Theatrical Trailer of Deewana, a heartfelt Telugu romantic drama starring Harshith Reddy and Smeha Manimegalai, written and directed by Sreekanth Sangishetty.

Also searched as Deevana, Divana, Devana, Dewana, and Diwana, Deewana is set for a worldwide theatrical release on June 19, 2026.

Distributed by Geetha Arts, experience the magic of love on the big screen.

Cast: Harshith Reddy, Smeha Manimegalai
Written & Directed by: Sreekanth Sangishetty

Music: Eswar chand
DOP: Vamsi Patchipulusu

Production Designer: Jhansi Gojala
Costumes: Manasa
PRO: SK Media
Marketing: Housefull
Audio: Lahari Music

bn.title: আমি আর পারছি না: ধামাল ৪ ট্রেলার রিভিউ | সুরাজ কুমার
bn.description:
🎬 ধামাল ৪ ট্রেলার প্রতিক্রিয়া ও পর্যালোচনা | অজয় ​​দেবগন | আরশাদ ওয়ারসি | রিতেশ দেশমুখ | জাভেদ জাফরি ​​| কমেডি মুভি রিভিউ

হ্যালো বন্ধুরা! 🙏
এই ভিডিওতে আমরা ধামাল ৪ ট্রেলারের একটি বিস্তারিত প্রতিক্রিয়া এবং পর্যালোচনা করতে চলেছি। ধামাল ফ্র্যাঞ্চাইজি কি আবারও দর্শকদের হাসাতে সফল হবে? আমরা কি অজয় ​​দেবগনের কমেডির জাদু এবং পুরনো তারকাদের প্রত্যাবর্তন দেখতে পাব? আমরা ট্রেলারের সেরা মুহূর্ত, কমেডি দৃশ্য, তারকাদের অভিনয় এবং সিনেমাটি নিয়ে প্রত্যাশা নিয়ে কথা বলব।

আপনিও যদি ধামাল ৪ ট্রেলারের জন্য অপেক্ষা করে থাকেন, তাহলে অবশ্যই ভিডিওটি শেষ পর্যন্ত দেখুন এবং কমেন্টে আপনার মতামত জানান।

snippet.title: SlumDog - 33 Temple Road Teaser (Telugu) | Puri Jagannadh | Vijay Sethupathi | Tabu | Samyuktha
snippet.description:
SlumDog - 33 Temple Road Teaser (Telugu) on Puri Jagannadh YouTube Channel.

SlumDog - 33 Temple Road is an upcoming gritty pan-India action drama which brings dashing director Puri Jagannadh and versatile actor Makkalselvan Vijay Sethupathi together for one of the most intriguing collaborations. Also co-stars Tabu, Samyuktha, Duniya Vijay and others. Produced by Puri Jagannadh and Charmme Kaur under the Puri Connects banner, in collaboration with JB Narayan Rao Kondrolla's JB Motion Pictures. 

#PuriJagannadh #VijaySethupathi #SlumDog33TempleRoad #Tabu #Samyuktha #DuniyaVijay #CharmmeKaur #PuriConnects #LatestTeluguMovieTeasers #LatestTeluguMovies

Cast & Crew Details:

Cast: Makkalselvan Vijay Sethupathi, Tabu, Samyuktha, Duniya Vijay Kumar, Zarina Wahab, VTV Ganesh, Brahmaji and Others.

snippet.title: Fears to Fathom - Scratch Creek
snippet.description:
A new episode of fears to fathom but this time it's a co-op adventure so my brother is joining in for the adventure where we play as a couple who took really bad decisions and ended up almost getting kidnapped. 
Also the jumpscare at 24:30 was very loud while playing, me going to the desktop messed up the volume for that moment so it looks like it was very low and not scary but trust me, it was scary as hell lol. The volume is just low in the video for that moment. 

Here is a list of all my PC specs and the things I use in my Daily Life (Amazon Affiliate link) :-  https://www.amazon.in/shop/notshubatall

Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/beastboyshub

snippet.title: Raavan Trailer REVIEW | Anubhav Mohanty
snippet.description:
The teaser of the upcoming Odia film “Raavan”, starring Anubhav Mohanty, has taken everyone by surprise with its grand visuals, intense background score, and larger-than-life presentation. From the very first frame, Raavan looks like a game-changer for Ollywood, matching the cinematic standards of big-budget Bollywood and South Indian action films. Anubhav Mohanty’s powerful screen presence, the dark and intriguing atmosphere, and the high production values have already created massive excitement among fans.

In this video, I share my honest review and breakdown of the Raavan teaser, discussing why this film could become one of the biggest milestones in Odia cinema. Is Ollywood finally entering a new era of pan-Indian storytelling? Watch till the end to find out my thoughts on the performances, visuals, action sequences, and overall impact of this much-awaited teaser.

snippet.title: SADI SUN - Elvish Yadav & Simrat Kaur Randhawa | Harsh Nussi | Anshul Garg
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Sadi Sun featuring Elvish Yadav & Simrat Kaur Randhawa.

Audio Credits :-
Singer : Harsh Nussi 
Lyrics & Composer : Harsh Nussi x Deep Klair
Music : Harsh Nussi
Guitar : Sachin Sheriya
Engineered by : Hiten
Mix assistant : Jones
Female Model : Heena Mahey
Music Director : Sixthfebb & Kkd45
Editing by : Sixthfebb

Video Credits :-
Director : Satti Dhillon
Production house : RS Films and Production
Executive Producer : Rahul Sehal
Associate Director : Rajat Yadav 
Dop : Vikcee
Dop Ac : Rahul
Dop Ac : Rashwinder
VFX : Gagan Matharoo
Choreographer : John
Production managar : Rohit gaur,saksham mehta,gulshan, Jaadu
Production Assistant : Gurpreet Singh, Amarjeet,badal

Steady cam : HMC
Artist Hmu : Harry Bajwa
Artist costume : Rajat Manchanda 
Extra hmu : Sunny 
Production Design : Framecraft Film 
Art director : Suraj
Editor : Mr Editor 
Colourist : Onkar
Bts : Theharshphotographer
Junior casting : Aamir

PlayDMF Team :-
Founder & CEO : Anshul Garg  
Vice President : Raghav Sharma ( Pratick Sharma)
Label Manager : Sankalp Garg
Project Head : Gaurav Arora
Legal & Digital Manager : Ashima Chauhan
PlayDMF Team : Anshu Prasad & Samrat Tyagi
Artwork : Vicky Sandhu
Accounts Manager : Sanjay Sharma & Rajkummar Jha
Legal Asst : Maninder Kaur
Special Thanks : Virgin Music India

https://www.virginmusic.com/

Virgin Music India Team :-
Head : Amit Sharma 
Team : Nagesh Jadhav, Kajal Israni, Amol Suryavanshi, Krupa Munvar, Lavanya Dass & Nishtha Sikroria

Associated Brands :- 
DSG Investments Pvt. Ltd. (https://www.dsginvestments.com)
UPES University (https://www.upes.ac.in/)
Optima Insurance Brokers Private Limited (https://optima.co.in/)

Travel and Hospitality Partner : PRM Hospitality

Lyrics :-
Chup kar lang jaave kol di tu sang jaave
Ikko takkni ch tere rang vich rang jaave
Loki kehnde kithe jaayiye par asi khiche aayie
Kol di jado tu shanka ke saade vang jaave

Duniya di fikar bhula te sahi
Ki sochein saade baare samjha te sahi
Baaki sab tere baare puchi bethe aa 
Dil apne da dass raah te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi x2

Je puchdi aa keho jehe aa,shad de ni eho jehe aa 
Tere hone chaunde aa ni, Paavien asi jeho jehe aa
Dekh azma ke kude, apna bna ke kude
Tere bina hai ni koi, kehnde aa sounh khake kude

Sade naal thoda hass laa te sahi, naagan jyi bann dass laa te sahi
Banja tu raani kude saade dil di, deep deep aakh ke bula te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi

Tenu pouna zidd dil di, mai v vekhda kidda ni mildi
Hor sohniya boht jag te, par tetho ni nigaah meri hildi
Oo kade na kade taa sade taakre, asi bewajah ni tere piche khabre
Billo sachiya preeta pouna chounde aa, aevien khaali feelinga ni kude chakk rahe

Sanu khush jeha rehna tu sikha te sahi
Mukkdi aa gall koi muka te sahi
Baaki diyan gallan aapa fer krange
Pehla ishq paheli samjha te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi

#sadisun #elvishyadav #simrattkaur #harshnussi #harshnussi

bn.title: ধামাল ৪ : ট্রেলার - জুড়ওয়াজ
bn.description:
সাবস্ক্রাইব করুন! প্রতিদিন নতুন ভিডিও!

আমাদের এক্সক্লুসিভ মার্চেন্ডাইজ কিনুন : https://www.judwaaz.in

আমাদের সাথে যুক্ত হন :

► সাবস্ক্রাইব করুন : http://www.youtube.com/judwaazmusic
► ইনস্টাগ্রামে আমাদের ফলো করুন: http://www.instagram.com/judwaazmusic
► টুইটারে আমাদের ফলো করুন: https://www.twitter.com/judwaazofficial
► ফেসবুকে আমাদের লাইক করুন: https://www.facebook.com/judwaazofficial

জুড়ওয়াজ টিভি সাবস্ক্রাইব করুন : (মিউজিক রিভিউ)
https://www.youtube.com/@UC8RPTOUzbVhqmOlFbbqstJA 

জুড়ওয়াজ ওয়ার্ল্ডওয়াইড সাবস্ক্রাইব করুন : (ফিল্মি বিষয়)
https://www.youtube.com/@UCAoyjstr7FAXKw_Ta57FrPg 

বকওয়াজ উইথ জুড়ওয়াজ সাবস্ক্রাইব করুন : (মজার বিষয়) ভ্লগ)
https://www.youtube.com/@UCAoyjstr7FAXKw_Ta57FrPg

মূল ক্রেডিট এবং লিঙ্ক:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IG-eByZdz6Y

অভিনয়: অজয় ​​দেবগন, আরশাদ ওয়ার্সি, রিতেশ দেশমুখ, জাভেদ জাফেরি, রবি কিষাণ, সঞ্জয় মিশ্র, উপেন্দ্র লিমায়ে, অঞ্জলি আনন্দ, সঞ্জিদা শেখ এবং এশা গুপ্তা।

পরিচালকঃ ইন্দ্র কুমার
প্রযোজনা করেছেন: অজয় ​​দেবগন
প্রযোজনা করেছেন: ভূষণ কুমার, কৃষাণ কুমার
প্রযোজনা করেছেন: অশোক ঠাকেরিয়া, ইন্দ্র কুমার, আনন্দ পণ্ডিত, কুমার মঙ্গত পাঠক
সহ-প্রযোজক: শিব চানানা 
সভাপতি (টি-সিরিজ): নীরজ কল্যাণ
সহ-প্রযোজক (মারুতি ইন্টারন্যাশনাল): ইয়াশ শাহ 
চিত্রনাট্য: পরিতোষ পেইন্টার, বলবিন্দর সিং সুরি, বেদ প্রকাশ, বান্টি রাঠোর সংলাপ: বান্টি রাঠোর 
আলোকচিত্র পরিচালক: সুধীর কুমার চৌধুরী
সম্পাদক: সঞ্জয় সাঙ্কলা 
সহযোগী প্রযোজক (মারুতি ইন্টারন্যাশনাল): দিলীপ মিস্ত্রি 
সহযোগী প্রযোজক (প্যানোরামা স্টুডিও): সঞ্জীব জোশী 
স্টুডিও প্রধান (দেবগন ফিল্মস): ড্যানিশ দেবগন 
সঙ্গীত: তানিষ্ক বাগচি, আদিত্য দেব, নীলকমল সিং, সঞ্জু রাঠোড, গুরু রান্ধাওয়া, গিল মাছরাই, রনি আজনালী 
গানের কথাঃ কুমার, গুরু রান্ধাওয়া, গিল মাছরাই, রনি আজনালি, সঞ্জু রাঠোড়, ধীরাজ বাবুয়ান
ব্যাকগ্রাউন্ড স্কোর: অমর মহিল 
সাউন্ড ডিজাইনারঃ প্রদীপ সুরি  
অ্যাকশন ডিরেক্টর: আর পি যাদব  
প্রোডাকশন ডিজাইনার: স্বপ্নিল ভালেরাও এবং মধুর মাধবন 
সহযোগী পরিচালকঃ অমিত সিং রাজপুত 
নির্বাহী প্রযোজক: পীতাম্বর খারাল (গণেশ) 
লাইন প্রডিউসার: ময়ূর পিথওয়া 
ইউনিট প্রোডাকশন ম্যানেজার: ভিপিন কুমার সিং 
প্রোডাকশন ম্যানেজার: দীপক রাই, রোহান হরেশ খিমানি 
কাস্টিং করেছেন: শহীদ হাসান 
কোরিওগ্রাফার: পীযূষ-শাজিয়া, রাহুল শেঠি 
প্রথম খ্রি: নবনির্মাণ সিং 
পোস্ট সুপারভাইজার: ভানু তেজ গুজরাটি 
পরিচালক সহকারী: অ্যালেন অ্যালডিসন
রি-রেকর্ডিং মিক্সার (মারিয়ানো স্টুডিওস): জাস্টিন জোস কে (সিএএস)
ভিএফএক্স: এনওয়াই ভিএফএক্সওয়ালা
ক্রিয়েটিভ হেড: নবীন পল 
বিজনেস হেড: যোগেশ ছাগ
ভিএফএক্স সুপারভাইজার: পঙ্কজ কালবেন্দে
সিওও: এন বিনোথ গণেশ 
ডিআই: এনওয়াই ডিআই-ওয়ালা 
ডিআই কালারিস্ট: সন্তোষ পাওয়ার (স্যান্টি), দীপ মাজিথিয়া
ডিআই হেড: সমীর বাসুদেও আরেকর
মিউজিক অন: টি-সিরিজ 
প্রজেক্ট হেড (টি-সিরিজ): হিত সাভলা 
মিউজিক হেড (টি-সিরিজ): শিবম চানানা 
মিউজিক মার্কেটিং হেড (টি-সিরিজ): ভিভিন সচদেবা
ফিল্ম মার্কেটিং লিড (টি-সিরিজ): নীল মেহতা 
ফিল্ম পিআর লিড (টি-সিরিজ): রাহুল দুবে 
ফিল্ম ডিজিটাল মার্কেটিং লিড (টি-সিরিজ): শাহরুখ খান 
ফিল্ম মার্কেটিং ও প্রোমোশন (টি-সিরিজ): মিতা চৌধুরী, হিত সাভলা
মিউজিক টিম (টি-সিরিজ): রাজ চানানা, সোনল চাওলা, ভিভিন সচদেবা
মিউজিক মার্কেটিং টিম (টি-সিরিজ): রাইসা ঘোষ, রাজীব আর্য, বিনয় যাদব
ডিজিটাল টিম (টি-সিরিজ): বরুণ অরোরা, জুহি সিং, প্রবীণ শর্মা
প্রচারণার ডিজাইন: ব্রেইন অন রেন্ট
ডিজিটাল মার্কেটিং: হোয়াইট রিভার্স মিডিয়া
ভিজ্যুয়াল প্রোমোশন (এম৭ মিডিয়া): মুকুল মিশ্র ও তার টিম
মিডিয়া কনসালটেন্ট (ইউনিভার্সাল কমিউনিকেশনস): পরাগ দেসাই

অস্বীকৃতি: নিম্নলিখিত অডিও/ভিডিওটি কঠোরভাবে প্রচারমূলক উদ্দেশ্যে তৈরি। আমরা এর কোনো বাণিজ্যিক ব্যবহার করতে চাই না এবং এর উদ্দেশ্য হলো সংশ্লিষ্ট শিল্পীর সৃজনশীলতা প্রদর্শন করা।

মূল কপিরাইট(গুলি) সম্পূর্ণরূপে কোম্পানি/মূল শিল্পী/রেকর্ড লেবেলের মালিকানাধীন। সমস্ত বিষয়বস্তু সংশ্লিষ্ট শিল্পীর সৃজনশীলতা প্রদর্শনের উদ্দেশ্যে তৈরি এবং এটি কঠোরভাবে প্রচারমূলক কাজে ব্যবহৃত হয়েছে।

*অস্বীকৃতি: ফেয়ার ইউজ নির্দেশিকার ৩য় ধারা অনুযায়ী, কোনো মূল কাজ থেকে অল্প কিছু অংশ ধার করাকে ফেয়ার ইউজ হিসেবে গণ্য করার সম্ভাবনা বেশি। কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী, ফেয়ার ইউজের অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে।

#Judwaaz #Dhamaal4

snippet.title: Nai Dabde - Official Music Video | Gulab Sidhu | Karmita Kaur | Kulshan Sandhu

A powerful Punjabi track by Gulab Sidhu, Nai Dabde brings a bold attitude, strong vocals, and high-energy beats. The song delivers a fearless vibe with a stylish, impactful music video that reflects confidence and dominance.

Singer: Gulab Sidhu
Lyrics / Composer: Preet Sukh
Music: Kulshan Sandhu

Video: Hitesh Arora

snippet.description:

Disclaimer:
All characters, events, and situations shown in this video are completely fictional and created for entertainment purposes only. Any resemblance to real persons or events is purely coincidental.

After finishing his gym workout, Franklin meets a beautiful girl who instantly falls for him. He likes her too and brings her home to introduce her to Shinchan. ta.title: இந்தக் கிராமம் ஏழ்மையில் இருந்ததால் நான் இங்கே ஒரு தங்கச் சுரங்கத்தை உருவாக்கினேன் 😱🤑| ஹைட்ரோனீர்
ta.description:
புதிய வீடியோக்களுக்கு சப்ஸ்கிரைப் செய்யுங்கள்

🤗 இன்ஸ்டாகிராமில் என்னைப் பின்தொடருங்கள்: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

இந்த வீடியோ உங்களுக்குப் பிடித்திருக்கும் என்று நம்புகிறேன். பிடித்திருந்தால், தயவுசெய்து லைக் செய்து பகிருங்கள்.

1976 ஆம் ஆண்டின் பதிப்புரிமைச் சட்டத்தின் பிரிவு 107-இன் கீழ் பதிப்புரிமை மறுப்புரை: விமர்சனம், கருத்துரை, செய்தி அறிக்கை, கற்பித்தல், கல்விப் புலமை, கல்வி மற்றும் ஆராய்ச்சி போன்ற நோக்கங்களுக்காக "நியாயமான பயன்பாட்டிற்கு" அனுமதி வழங்கப்படுகிறது.

நியாயமான பயன்பாடு என்பது பதிப்புரிமைச் சட்டங்களால் அனுமதிக்கப்பட்ட ஒரு பயன்பாடாகும், இல்லையெனில் அது மீறலாகக் கருதப்படலாம்.

ml.title: ഈ ഗ്രാമം ദരിദ്രമായിരുന്നു, അതിനാൽ ഞാൻ ഇവിടെ ഒരു സ്വർണ്ണഖനി ഉണ്ടാക്കി 😱🤑| HYDRONEER
ml.description:
പുതിയ വീഡിയോകൾക്കായി സബ്‌സ്‌ക്രൈബുചെയ്യുക

🤗 ഇൻസ്റ്റാഗ്രാമിൽ എന്നെ പിന്തുടരുക: ​https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

വീഡിയോ ഇഷ്ടപ്പെട്ടെങ്കിൽ നിങ്ങൾ ഇഷ്ടപ്പെട്ടുവെന്ന് ഞാൻ പ്രതീക്ഷിക്കുന്നു, ദയവായി വീഡിയോ ലൈക്ക് ചെയ്‌ത് പങ്കിടുക. 

1976 ലെ പകർപ്പവകാശ നിയമത്തിലെ സെക്ഷൻ 107 പ്രകാരം, വിമർശനം, അഭിപ്രായം, വാർത്താ റിപ്പോർട്ടിംഗ്, അധ്യാപനം, സ്കോളർഷിപ്പ്, വിദ്യാഭ്യാസം, ഗവേഷണം തുടങ്ങിയ ആവശ്യങ്ങൾക്ക് "ന്യായമായ ഉപയോഗത്തിന്" അനുമതി നൽകിയിട്ടുണ്ട്.

പകർപ്പവകാശ നിയമങ്ങൾ അനുവദിക്കുന്ന ഒരു ഉപയോഗമാണ് ന്യായമായ ഉപയോഗം, അല്ലാത്തപക്ഷം അത് ലംഘിക്കപ്പെടാം.

iw.title: הכפר הזה היה עני אז יצרתי כאן מכרה זהב 😱🤑| הידרונר
iw.description:
אנא הירשמו לסרטונים חדשים

🤗 עקבו אחריי באינסטגרם: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

אני מקווה שנהניתם מהסרטון, אם כן, אנא עשו לייק ושתפו את הסרטון.

הצהרת זכויות יוצרים תחת סעיף 107 לחוק זכויות היוצרים משנת 1976, מתירה "שימוש הוגן" למטרות כגון ביקורת, תגובות, דיווח חדשותי, הוראה, מלגות, חינוך ומחקר.

שימוש הוגן הוא שימוש המותר על פי חוקי זכויות יוצרים שאחרת עלול להוות הפרה.

ja.title: 貧乏だった村に金山を作ってみた結果😱🤑 | HYDRONEER

১৯৭৬ সালের কপিরাইট আইনের ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি, শিক্ষা এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের" অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে।

ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত এমন একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে।

pa.title: ਇਹ ਪਿੰਡ ਗਰੀਬ ਸੀ ਇਸ ਲਈ ਮੈਂ ਇੱਥੇ ਸੋਨੇ ਦੀ ਖਾਣ ਬਣਾ ਦਿੱਤੀ 😱🤑| HYDRONEER
pa.description:
ਨਵੇਂ ਵੀਡੀਓਜ਼ ਲਈ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ ਸਬਸਕ੍ਰਾਈਬ ਕਰੋ

🤗 ਇੰਸਟਾਗ੍ਰਾਮ 'ਤੇ ਮੇਰਾ ਪਾਲਣ ਕਰੋ: ​https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

ਮੈਨੂੰ ਉਮੀਦ ਹੈ ਕਿ ਤੁਹਾਨੂੰ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਪਸੰਦ ਆਈ ਹੋਵੇਗੀ, ਜੇਕਰ ਤੁਹਾਨੂੰ ਪਸੰਦ ਆਈ ਹੈ, ਤਾਂ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਨੂੰ ਲਾਈਕ ਅਤੇ ਸ਼ੇਅਰ ਕਰੋ।

ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਅਸਵੀਕਾਰਨ 1976 ਦੇ ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਐਕਟ ਦੀ ਧਾਰਾ 107 ਦੇ ਤਹਿਤ, ਆਲੋਚਨਾ, ਟਿੱਪਣੀ, ਖ਼ਬਰਾਂ ਦੀ ਰਿਪੋਰਟਿੰਗ, ਸਿੱਖਿਆ, ਸਕਾਲਰਸ਼ਿਪ, ਸਿੱਖਿਆ ਅਤੇ ਖੋਜ ਵਰਗੇ ਉਦੇਸ਼ਾਂ ਲਈ "ਨਿਰਪੱਖ ਵਰਤੋਂ" ਦੀ ਇਜਾਜ਼ਤ ਹੈ।

ਨਿਰਪੱਖ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਕਾਨੂੰਨਾਂ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਆਗਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਾਪਤ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਹੋਰ ਉਲੰਘਣਾ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੀ ਹੈ।

న్యాయమైన వినియోగం అనేది కాపీరైట్ చట్టాల ద్వారా అనుమతించబడిన ఒక వినియోగం, లేకపోతే అది ఉల్లంఘన కావచ్చు.

snippet.title: MASOOM SHARMA: MARD 2 | Pinna Music | New Haryanvi Song 2026 #masoomsharmanewsong
snippet.description:
WHITE HILL DHAAKAD PRESENTS 🔥 MARD 2 | Out Now 🔥Masoom Sharma New Song

The wait is over! The roar returns stronger, louder, and bolder with MARD 2, the latest Haryanvi song 2026 by Masoom Sharma. Packed with fearless attitude, powerful lyrics, and hard-hitting music, this new haryanvi song celebrates the pride, courage, and unmatched swag of Haryana.

If you loved Mard, get ready to witness the next level of desi power. Turn up the volume and experience the energy of MARD 2!

🎵 Listen, Share & Support the Song Now!

#Mard2 #newharyanvisong #masoomsharmanewsong #WhiteHillDhaakad #HaryanviSong #NewHaryanviSong #LatestHaryanviSong #HaryanviMusic #DesiSwag #TrendingHaryanviSong #HaryanviCulture #HaryanviStatus #ViralHaryanviSong 

🎧 Credits:

Song: Mard 2
Singer/ Composer: Masoom Sharma
Lyrics: Kirti Kumar Satta, Rahul Muana
Music: Pinna Music

Video Credits:

Director: Shekharr Salaria
DOP: Arundeep Teji
Editor: Bharat Mittal (Team360)
Production: AJ Films Production
Project: Deepak Pradhan
Online Promotions: Hub Of Talent
Produced By: Gunbir Singh Sidhu & Manmord Singh Sidhu


#Mard2OfficialVideo #MasoomSharmaNewSong #Haryanvi2026 #NewHaryanviMusic #DesiAttitude #HaryanviTrending #WhiteHillMusic #HaryanviVideoSong #LatestHaryanviHits

🎧 Listen on :

🎵 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/51YAvF7xSDJuErL6wa0Kyz?si=7f93107fc1cf4df3
🍏 Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/song/mard-2/6776237833
🎼 iTunes: https://music.apple.com/us/song/mard-2/6776237833
🎧 YouTube Music:https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=4d274q1mFng&si=mGxtfRni_17mK5NU
🎶 JioSaavn: https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/mard-2/I1wKbhdDfX4
🎧 Gaana:https://gaana.com/song/mard-2-7723-7601

Lyrics:

Saari duniya gaati aayi amar kahani marda ki
Desh dharm ki khaatir gal gi ghor jawani marda ki
Kesari jhanda sar pe kafan poshak purani marda ki
Main kha tyaag aur balidaan bhi se ek nishani marda ki
Jo kahi jubaan pe datte karke vachan na paachhe hatte
Kat jya sar dhad rah jya ladde mard aisa randhaari ho se
Are tanne chaal gina dayu aaj mard ki kalli kalli baat
Lagade kon mard ke haath mard ki baat ae nyaari ho se re
Tanne chaal gina dayu aaj mard ki kalli kalli baat
Lagade kon mard ke haath mard ki baat ae nyaari ho se re


Are bhramaastar sa baan mila manne saare dhaal ka gyaan mila
Lakshya ne bedhan janu ichha mrityu ka vardhaan milya
Re jeet rahul muana adjya satta haet aala jeet khad jya
Donu 100 pe bhaari pad jya jab gailya balkaari ho se
Tanne chaal gina dayu aaj mard ki kalli kalli baat
Lagade kon mard ke haath mard ki baat ae nyaari ho se re
Tanne chaal gina dayu aaj mard ki kalli kalli baat
Lagade kon mard ke haath mard ki baat ae nyaari ho se re


Choom ke fanda faansi ka jo latke haste haste re
Ek nyaari ae duniya marda ki duniya te nyaare raste re
Re ghar ne ghar ki thyaod basaade sab kumbe ka maan badaade
Izzat chaand shikhar poncha de mard aisa gharbaari ho se
Are tanne chaal gina dayu aaj mard ki kalli kalli baat
Lagade kon mard ke haath mard ki baat ae nyaari ho se re
Tanne chaal gina dayu aaj mard ki kalli kalli baat
Lagade kon mard ke haath mard ki baat ae nyaari ho se re

snippet.title: Bhul Jana – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Bhul Jana – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---



Agar mumkin ho…
to hume bhul jana.

Hum tumhari zindagi me
sirf dard bankar aaye the…
aur ab yaadon me bhi
rehna nahi chahte.

Mohabbat sachchi thi meri…
par shayad
tumhare liye nahi thi.

“Bhul Jana”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo toot kar bhi
sirf dusre ki khushi chahta raha.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
judai bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

agar sukoon mile…
to hume bhul jana…

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se chaha ho
aur phir use khud se door karna pada ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Heartbreak • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)


---

🎧 Listen on Streaming Platforms

Spotify ► https://open.spotify.com/artist/1qfsPgztwYGU0GUCNgDiLW

Apple Music ► https://music.apple.com/in/artist/aarzoo-khaan/1849887888

JioSaavn ► https://www.saavn.com/s/artist/aarzoo-khaan-albums/ohZytQRCSLE_

Gaana ► https://gaana.com/artist/aarzoo-khaan

Amazon Music ► https://music.amazon.in/artists/B0FSCHHVNN/aarzoo-khaan


---

📲 Follow Aarzoo Khaan

YouTube ► https://youtube.com/@Aarzoo2khaan

Instagram ► https://www.instagram.com/Aarzoo2khaan

Facebook ► https://www.facebook.com/Aarzoo2khaan

localized.title: Bhul Jana – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
localized.description:
Bhul Jana – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---



Agar mumkin ho…
to hume bhul jana.

Hum tumhari zindagi me
sirf dard bankar aaye the…
aur ab yaadon me bhi
rehna nahi chahte.

Mohabbat sachchi thi meri…
par shayad
tumhare liye nahi thi.

“Bhul Jana”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo toot kar bhi
sirf dusre ki khushi chahta raha.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
judai bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

agar sukoon mile…
to hume bhul jana…

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se chaha ho
aur phir use khud se door karna pada ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Heartbreak • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

snippet.description:
గోవింద నామాలు | Govinda Namalu Telugu Lyrics | Lord Venkateswara Devotional Songs In Telugu  


🌸 Govinda Namalu | Lord Venkateswara Devotional Songs | Telugu Lyrics 🙏 🌸

Listen to Govinda Namalu, the sacred hymns filled with the divine names of Lord Venkateswara Swamy.
These powerful bhajans are believed to bring wealth, prosperity, peace, and happiness into your life.

🪔 Benefits of Listening:

Removes negative energies and obstacles
Brings financial stability and abundance
Provides mental peace and spiritual strength
Listening daily brings special blessings and divine grace
Recite or listen with the mantra “Om Namo Venkateswaraya”
Light a lamp and listen with devotion

✨ Regular listening to Govinda Namalu invites the blessings of Lord Venkateswara, giving wealth, prosperity, and spiritual growth.

snippet.title: Main Agar Saamne | Dino Morea | Bipasha Basu | Abhijeet | Alka Yagnik | Bollywood Wedding Song
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song: Main Agar Saamne
Movie: Raaz
Singer(s): Abhijeet & Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Nadeem - Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Tips Films & Mahesh Bhatt
Director: Vikram Bhatt
Cast: Bipasha Basu, Dino Morea, Malini Sharma & Ashutosh Rana 

Song Lyrics:
Main Agar Saamne Aa Bhi Jaaya Karoon
Laazmi Hai Ki Tum Mujhse Parda Karo
Apni Shaadi Ke Din Ab Nahin Door Hai
Main Bhi Tadpa Karoon Tum Bhi Tadpa Karon
Bada Mushkil Hai Yeh Mera Dil Hai
Bada Mushkil Hai Yeh Mera Dil Hai
Tum Hi Kaho Kaise Mein Chup Rahoon
Tum Agar Samne Aa Bhi Jaaya Karon
Laazmi Hai Ki Main Tumse Parda Karo
Apni Shaadi Ke Din Ab Nahin Door Hai
Main Bhi Tadpa Karoon Tum Bhi Tadpa Karon
Bada Mushkil Hai Yeh Mera Dil Hai
Bada Mushkil Hai Yeh Mera Dil Hai
Tum Hi Kaho Kaise Mein Chup Rahoon
Tum Agar Samne Aa Bhi Jaaya Karon
Laazmi Hai Ki Main Tumse Parda Karo

Satane Ke Manane Ke Yeh Din Hai Aazmaane Ke
Zara Samjha Karo Dilbar Tumhe Meri Kasam
Yehi Meri Hai Majboori Sahi Jaaye Na Ab Doori
Mera Kya Haal Hai Kaise Bataaon Sanam
Zameen Hogi Gagan Hoga Tera Mera Milan Hoga
Main Agar Tum Se Nazren Milaaya Karon 
Laazmi Hai Ki Tum Mujhse Parda Karo

Main Duniya Sa Chala Jaaon Kabhi Na Laut Ke Aaon
Karogi Kya Akele Tum Bataao Dilruba
Main Rab Se Cheen Laaongi Tujhe Apna Banaungi
Chale Gi Saas Jab Tak Yeh Na Hoge Hum Juda
Na Apni Yeh Kasam Tote Jo Rab Roothe To Rab Roothe

Main Agar Saamne Aa Bhi Jaaya Karoon
Laazmi Hai Ki Tum Mujhse Parda Karo
Apni Shaadi Ke Din Ab Nahin Door Hai
Main Bhi Tadpa Karoon Tum Bhi Tadpa Karon
Bada Mushkil Hai Yeh Mera Dil Hai
Tum Hi Kaho Kaise Mein Chup Rahoon
Main Agar Saamne Aa Bhi Jaaya Karo
Laazmi Hai Ki Tum Mujhse Parda Karo

snippet.title: Shinchan & Franklin Builds a Dairy Milk Chocolate House 🍫🤯 | GTA 5 Tamil Mods
snippet.description:
Shinchan & Franklin Builds a Dairy Milk Chocolate House 🍫🤯 | GTA 5 Tamil Mods

Welcome to GTA MEENU ❤️

In this amazing GTA 5 Tamil Mod Gameplay, Shinchan and Franklin finally transform their entire house into a Giant Dairy Milk Silk Chocolate Mansion 🍫😱. The walls, roof, swimming pool, and garden are filled with huge Dairy Milk Silk chocolates!

Meenu and Shinchan are completely shocked when they see this giant chocolate paradise. What happens when Shinchan and Franklin start exploring their sweet chocolate mansion?

Watch till the end for funny moments, exciting adventures, and an unforgettable GTA 5 Tamil story!

🔥 Giant Chocolate Mansion
🔥 GTA 5 Tamil Mods
🔥 Family Friendly Entertainment

Subscribe to GTA MEENU for more daily GTA 5 Tamil adventures ❤️

snippet.title: Kasam Khake Kaho - Lyrical | Preity Zinta | Arjun Rampal | Mahima | Kumar Sanu | Alka Yagnik
snippet.description:
Song Credits :
Singer(s) : Alka Yagnik & Kumar Sanu
Music Director : Nadeem Shravan
Lyricist : Sameer

Lyrics :

Hey Hey Hey Aa Ha Ha...
Kasam Khake Kaho Muskurake Kaho, Dil Lagake Kaho Pas Aake Kaho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai 
 
Sharmake Kaho Balkhake Kaho, Ha Kaho Naa Kaho Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai
 
Ek Ajab See Dil Me Hasrat Hotee Hai Tumko Dekhke
Chahe Tumko Dil Me Chahat Hotee Hai Tumko Dekhke
Hame Pyar Karo, Ikrar Karo, Sanso Me Basake Rakh Lo
Tum Sham-O-Saher Didar Karo, Khwabo Me Chhupake Rakh Lo
 
Najar Jhukake Kaho, Palak Uthake Kaho
Ha Kaho Naa Kaho, Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

Ek Bechainee See Hotee Hai, Abb Toh Tere Nam Se
Ishk Huwa Jab Se Naa Gujra Ek Lamha Aaram Se
Kya Hal Huwa Chahat Me Sanam, Mushkil Hai Tumse Kuchh Kehna
Hai Tumko Kasam Mehbub Kabhee, Aankho Se Dur Naa Rehna
Itrake Kaho, Jhilmilake Kaho, Ha Kaho Naa Kaho Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

Kasam Khake Kaho Muskurake Kaho
Han Kaho Naa Kaho, Pas Aake Kaho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

#KasamKhakeKaho #DilHaiTumhaara #PreityZinta #ArjunRampal #AlkaYagnik #KumarSanu #MahimaChaudhary

Hame Pyar Karo, Ikrar Karo, Sanso Me Basake Rakh Lo
Tum Sham-O-Saher Didar Karo, Khwabo Me Chhupake Rakh Lo
 
Najar Jhukake Kaho, Palak Uthake Kaho
Ha Kaho Naa Kaho, Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

Ek Bechainee See Hotee Hai, Abb Toh Tere Nam Se
Ishk Huwa Jab Se Naa Gujra Ek Lamha Aaram Se
Kya Hal Huwa Chahat Me Sanam, Mushkil Hai Tumse Kuchh Kehna
Hai Tumko Kasam Mehbub Kabhee, Aankho Se Dur Naa Rehna
Itrake Kaho, Jhilmilake Kaho, Ha Kaho Naa Kaho Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

Kasam Khake Kaho Muskurake Kaho
Han Kaho Naa Kaho, Pas Aake Kaho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

#KasamKhakeKaho #DilHaiTumhaara #PreityZinta #ArjunRampal #AlkaYagnik #KumarSanu #MahimaChaudhary

There are also New Defense levels at Town Hall 18, and we got a glimpse into the Ruin Witch and Angry Spell, which I will be explaining in tomorrows sneak peek video. Clash On!

snippet.title: O Firki Wali Tu Kal Phir Aana ! Dance Video ! Insta Trending Song ! ओ फिरकी वाली तू कल फिर आना #dj
snippet.description:
O Firki Wali Tu Kal Phir Aana ! Dance Video ! Insta Trending Song ! ओ फिरकी वाली तू कल फिर आना #dj 
O Firki Wali Tu Kal Aaja ❤️ | 90's Bollywood Style Romantic Song | Hindi Love Song 2026

O Firki Wali ek heart touching Hindi romantic song hai jo 90's Bollywood ke retro vibes aur emotional love story ko capture karta hai. Yeh gaana un sab ke liye hai jo sachche pyaar, yaadein aur judai ko mehsoos karte hain.

Isme aapko milega:
• Retro Bollywood feel 🎞️
• Emotional aur soulful lyrics 💔
• Soft melody jo dil ko chhoo jaaye 🎶
• Old is gold style romantic vibe ✨

Agar aapko 90's Bollywood songs, sad love songs, aur Hindi romantic music pasand hai, to yeh gaana aapke playlist me zaroor hona chahiye.

🎧 Best experience ke liye headphones use karein

👉 Like 👍 | Share 🔄 | Subscribe 🔔 zaroor karein
👉 Comment me batayein aapko yeh gaana kaisa laga ❤️

(Song Lyrics) 

ओ फ़िरकी वाली तू कल आ जा,
सपनों में मेरे फिर समा जा।
तेरी बातों का रंग निराला,
दिल को मेरे फिर बहला जा॥

जब से देखा तेरा चेहरा,
दिल ने तुझको अपना माना।
चाँद भी शरमा जाए देखे,
तेरा प्यारा सा मुस्काना॥

पायल की छम-छम सुनकर,
दिल मेरा बेकरार हो जाए।
एक नज़र जो तू मिलाए,
हर मौसम बहार हो जाए॥

ओ फ़िरकी वाली तू कल आ जा,
दिल की गलियों में फिर छा जा।
तेरी हँसी का जादू ऐसा,
सारी दुनिया को भुला जा॥

तेरी ज़ुल्फों की ठंडी छाँव,
मुझको अपना घर लगती है।
तेरी बातों की मीठी खुशबू,
साँसों में घुल जाती है॥

रातों को जब याद तू आए,
नींदों का पता खो जाए।
दिल के हर एक कोने में बस,
तेरा ही चेहरा नज़र आए॥

आ जा सजना देर न करना,
दिल को यूँ मजबूर न करना।
तेरे बिना ये तन्हा रातें,
लगती हैं सदियों के जैसा॥

hi.description:
O Firki Wali Tu Kal Phir Aana ! Dance Video ! Insta Trending Song ! ओ फिरकी वाली तू कल फिर आना #dj 
O Firki Wali Tu Kal Aaja ❤️ | 90's Bollywood Style Romantic Song | Hindi Love Song 2026

O Firki Wali ek heart touching Hindi romantic song hai jo 90's Bollywood ke retro vibes aur emotional love story ko capture karta hai. Yeh gaana un sab ke liye hai jo sachche pyaar, yaadein aur judai ko mehsoos karte hain.

Isme aapko milega:
• Retro Bollywood feel 🎞️
• Emotional aur soulful lyrics 💔
• Soft melody jo dil ko chhoo jaaye 🎶
• Old is gold style romantic vibe ✨

Agar aapko 90's Bollywood songs, sad love songs, aur Hindi romantic music pasand hai, to yeh gaana aapke playlist me zaroor hona chahiye.

(Song Lyrics) 

ओ फ़िरकी वाली तू कल आ जा,
सपनों में मेरे फिर समा जा।
तेरी बातों का रंग निराला,
दिल को मेरे फिर बहला जा॥

जब से देखा तेरा चेहरा,
दिल ने तुझको अपना माना।
चाँद भी शरमा जाए देखे,
तेरा प्यारा सा मुस्काना॥

पायल की छम-छम सुनकर,
दिल मेरा बेकरार हो जाए।
एक नज़र जो तू मिलाए,
हर मौसम बहार हो जाए॥

ओ फ़िरकी वाली तू कल आ जा,
दिल की गलियों में फिर छा जा।
तेरी हँसी का जादू ऐसा,
सारी दुनिया को भुला जा॥

तेरी ज़ुल्फों की ठंडी छाँव,
मुझको अपना घर लगती है।
तेरी बातों की मीठी खुशबू,
साँसों में घुल जाती है॥

रातों को जब याद तू आए,
नींदों का पता खो जाए।
दिल के हर एक कोने में बस,
तेरा ही चेहरा नज़र आए॥

आ जा सजना देर न करना,
दिल को यूँ मजबूर न करना।
तेरे बिना ये तन्हा रातें,
लगती हैं सदियों के जैसा॥

snippet.title: Sun Saathiya Full Video | Disney's ABCD 2 | Varun Dhawan , Shraddha Kapoor | Sachin Jigar | Priya S
snippet.description:
Catch the full video of Sun Saathiya from Disney's ABCD 2 starring Varun Dhawan & Shraddha Kapoor. 

Title: Sun Saathiya
Movie: Disney's ABCD 2
Music Composer: Sachin – Jigar
Lyrics: Priya Saraiya
Singers: Priya Saraiya, Divya Kumar

Director: Remo D’Souza
Producer: Siddharth Roy Kapur
Production House: Disney

Lyrics:

Ho.. Sun Saathiya Maahiya
Barsa De Ishqa Ki Syahiyaan

Rang Jaaun, Rang Rang Jaaun Ri, Haari Main
Tujhpe Main Jhar Jhar Jhar Jaaun

Hoon Piya Bas Teri Main
Ho Chhu Le Toh Khari Main
(Toh Khari Main Khari Main…)

Main Ret Si, Boond Ka Zariya Tu
Paa Ke Tujhe Bheeg Jaaun Re
Main Ret Si, Boond Ka Zariya Tu
Paa Ke Tujhe Bheeg Jaaun Ri

Tar Jaaun Tar Tar Jaaun
Dariya Ye Tar Jaaun Jee
Ishq Ye Paake Main Tera
Nikhar Jaaun Ri…
Piya Bas Teri Main
Ho.. Chhu Le Toh Khari Main
Toh Khari Main Khari Main…

Sun Saathiya Maahiya
Barsa De Ishqa Ki Syahiyaan...

🕺🎧Welcome to Dance Masti Hits, the perfect place for all your dance and party mood needs! 

🎶❤️If you love energetic songs that make you dance instantly, this channel is made just for you. We bring you a collection of high-energy dance tracks, party anthems, and feel-good music that keep your vibe alive all day long.

#ABCD2 #VarunDhawan #ShraddhaKapoor #SachinJigar #NewHindiSongs

snippet.title: Aarzu (with Asim Azhar) Official Music Video | Asim Azhar, Noor, Khan, Madhurxo
snippet.description:
If Aarzu found a place in your heart, Asim Azhar's rendition takes it even deeper. Wrapped in dreamy melodies and timeless emotion, this version captures the beauty of yearning for someone who never truly leaves.


Listen Now:
Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/1GnZH0wek1fkGCQnUsK6D0?si=c8a640db631c4690 Apple Music -  https://music.apple.com/in/song/aarzu-with-asim-azhar/6772998267 
YouTube Music - https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=M5OCLifZK1w&si=F6FdB9DEXBskKoUu 

Audio Credits: 
Music by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Lyrics by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Vocals by Asim Azhar, Khan, Madhurxo
Written by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Produced by Noor
Guitars by Melvin Arthur
Mixed & Mastered by Kumail Abbas

Video Credits: 
Director - Khizar Sheikh
Producer - Syed Jahanzaib Ali
Executive Producer - Gul-E-Rana
D.O.P & Edit - Fraz KB 
Grade - Maaz Ahmad Ansari

Lyrics:

(Khan)

Tera sharmana meri jaana kabhi
Rakhlu chupaake teri yaadein sabh
Khwaabon main mere hai tu hi basi

Tera sharmana meri jaana kabhi
Rakhlu chupaake teri yaadein sabh
Khwaabon main mere hai tu hi basi

(Madhurxo)

Peeche dekhu raahein teri yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaabon main basa hai tu hi tu.
Sawalon main main rakhlu chupake mujhe tu hi toh bigaade
Meri aankhon main saja hai tu hi tu

Peeche dekhu raahein teri yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaabon main basa hai tu hi tu.
Sawalon main main rakhlu chupake mujhe tu hi toh bigaade
Meri aankhon main saja hai tu hi tu

(Asim Azhar)

Oh kaisi dilkashi 
Tujh se dillagi
Mere humnasheen… hmmmm
Kioun chupaoun main
Ab koi darr nahi
Tu jaisay meri pari
Masoomiyut chulkay teri
Baatoun se kitni…hayee
Saada si jo adaa’ein teri
Qatil hai woh
Dil ki meri

Peechay dekhoun raahein teri
Yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

(Unknown)

Phirse Bolo

(Asim Azhar)

Peechay dekho raahein teri
Yaad jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basi… tu hi basi

(Khan and Asim)

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basi… tu hi basi

(Outro)

Dono jahan teri muhabbat mein haar ke
Woh ja raha hai koi Shab’e Ghum guzaar ke
Weera’an hai maikada khum-o-saagar udaas hain     
Tum kya gaye k rooth gaye din bahaar

Connect: 
Asim Azhar ( https://www.instagram.com/asimazhar/?hl=en)
Khan (https://www.instagram.com/soundslikekhan/)
Noor (https://www.instagram.com/noor_wav/)
Madhurxo (https://www.instagram.com/madhuraaara/)

#AsimAzhar #Aarzu #PakistaniPop #DesiMusic #NewMusic #IPop 

(C) 2026 Asim Azhar

bn.description:
আজকের 🔴 লাইভ স্ট্রিমে, আমরা গ্র্যান্ড থেফট অটো V-এর ভেতরে একটি অসাধারণ পরীক্ষা করতে যাচ্ছি!

🚗💥 রেললাইনের উপর ১০০টি বিলাসবহুল গাড়ি পার্ক করা আছে
🚆 এবং সামনে থেকে একটি পূর্ণ গতির ট্রেন আসছে!

😱 এই দামী গাড়িগুলো কি ট্রেনটিকে থামাতে পারবে?
নাকি সবকিছু ধ্বংস হয়ে যাবে?

👉 লাইভে যোগ দিন এবং দেখুন কোন গাড়িটি সবচেয়ে শক্তিশালী!

snippet.title: मोहे मोर बनाइयो राधा 🦚 | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha | Krishna Bhakti Song | Official Video 2026 HD
snippet.description:
मोहे मोर बनाइयो राधा 🦚 | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha | Krishna Bhakti Song | Official Video 2026 HD



मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan

Song: मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan


Lose yourself in the sacred lanes of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition: "Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha." This Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan captures the deep desire of a devotee to become a peacock in the gardens of Nidhivan, just to be close to Radha Rani and Krishna.

मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा - वृंदावन की इस पावन धुन में खो जाएँ। Bhajan Tune आपके लिए लेकर आया है श्री राधा-कृष्ण की महिमा का एक ऐसा भजन जो आपके हृदय को शांति और आनंद से भर देगा।

यह मधुर और भावपूर्ण Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan ब्रज की पावन भावना और राधा-कृष्ण के दिव्य प्रेम को समर्पित है।
“मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधाअपने वृंदावन को” – यह पंक्ति भक्त की उस विनम्र प्रार्थना को दर्शाती है, जहाँ वह ब्रजधाम में मोर बनकर भी राधा-कृष्ण के चरणों में रहना चाहता है।

यह भजन ध्यान, जप, सुबह-शाम की पूजा, वृंदावन भक्ति, कीर्तन और मन की शांति के लिए अत्यंत उपयुक्त है। इसकी शांत धुन और प्रेमपूर्ण शब्द आत्मा को सुकून देते हैं और मन को वृंदावन की गलियों में ले जाते हैं।

Vrindavan Essence: Experience the 'Brij Ras' from the comfort of your home.

Soulful Peace: Perfect for morning meditation or evening relaxation.

📌 Keywords: Mohe Mor Banaiyo To Banaiyo Vrindavan Ko, मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा, Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan, Vrindavan Bhajan, Radha Krishna Song 2026, Bunty Thakur Bhajan, Krishna Meditation Music, Radha Rani Bhajan, Braj Bhakti Song

#radhakrishna #radhabhajan #krishnabhajan #radharani #bhajantune

snippet.title: Mithe Ras Se Bharyo Ri Radha Rani Lage | Radha Krishna Bhajan | Soulful Krishna Devotional Song
snippet.description:
Experience the divine sweetness of "Mithe Ras Se Bharyo Ri Radha Rani Lage", one of the most beloved Radha Krishna Bhajans that beautifully expresses devotion, love, and the eternal bond between Radha Rani and Lord Krishna. This soulful devotional song fills the heart with peace, positivity, and spiritual bliss.

Credits
Singer:  Rashmi Nishad
Music:  Manish Purohit
Lyrics: Traditional
Produced By: Durgaram Choudhary
Label: N.K. Music
© Copyright: Koo Koo Tv Entertainment Pvt. Ltd.
Digital Partner: RDC Media Pvt. Ltd.

Subscribe Now for Daily Bhajans, Mantras & Divine Spiritual Peace https://www.youtube.com/@UCz19fUPgGhhoEzs8vf6annA 

Lyrics - 
मीठे रस से भरीयो री 
राधा रानी लागे
महारानी लागे
मने कारो कारो
जमुना जी रो पानी लागे 

यमुना मैया कारी कारी
राधा गोरी गोरी
वृन्दावन में धूम मचावे
बरसाने की छोरी
ब्रजधाम राधा जी की
रजधानी लागे
मने कारो कारो
जमुना जी रो पानी लागे 
कान्हा नित मुरली मे टेरे
सुमरे बारम्बार
कोटिन रूप धरे मनमोहन
कोई ना पावे पार
राधा रूप की अनोखी
पटरानी लागे
मने कारो कारो
जमुना जी रो पानी लागे 

राधा राधा नाम रटत है
जो नर आठों याम
उनकी बाधा दूर करत है
राधा राधा नाम
राधा नाम मे सफल
जिंदगानी लागे
जिंदगानी लागे
मने कारो कारो
जमुना जी रो पानी लागे 

मीठे रस से भरयो री
राधा रानी लागे
महारानी लागे
मने कारो कारो
जमुना जी रो पानी लागे

Subscribe Now for Daily Bhajans, Mantras & Divine Spiritual Peace https://www.youtube.com/@UCz19fUPgGhhoEzs8vf6annA

snippet.title: Vallah (Official Video) Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika | Pritam, Bayanni, Harrdy S, Amitabh B | Cocktail 2
snippet.description:
Warning: #Vallah may cause sudden dancing. 
Song out now.

#Cocktail2 in cinemas on June 19.

#Cocktail2Song #MaddockFilms 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🎧 Song Credits 

➟ Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon & Rashmika Mandanna 
➟ Music Label : Universal Music India and Mad For Mussic 
➟ Music - Pritam
➟ Lyrics- Amitabh Bhattacharya
➟ Punjabi Lyrics - Rony Ajnali and Gill Machhrai
➟ Singers - Bayanni, Harrdy Sandhu

➟ Music Programmer and Arranger - AM.AN
Mixed and Mastered by - Eric Pillai at Future Sound of Bombay
Audio Post Production Supervisor and Chief Engineer - Ashwin Kulkarni

Music Production Managers - Anurag Sharma, Brianna Supriyo
Studio Manager - Mithila Lad Nayak

Sound Engineers - Pranav Gupta, Aniruddh Anantha, Aarvan, Akash Mukherjee

Studio Assistants - Khush Jaggi, Ameya Dayal, Sagnik Mukherjee. 
Studio Intern- Anushree Amod

Shout - Aasa Singh
Backing Vocals Design and Vocals -  Aarvan, Aniruddh Anantha
Additional Chorus - Anurag Sharma, Akash Mukherjee, Sagnik Mukherjee

Live Guitars by - AM.AN 

Assistant to Eric Pillai - Michael Edwin Pillai


#Cocktail2​, releasing in cinemas on 19th June, 2026


🎬 Video Credits

➟ Directed By: Homi Adajania 
➟ Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan, Pramita R Vijan and Ankur Garg 
➟ Written By: Tarun Jain and Luv Ranjan
➟ Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna
➟ Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja

➟ Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
➟ Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
➟ Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
➟ Director of Choreography: Vijay A. Ganguly
➟ Publicity Design: Himanshu  & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

Lyrics:

Ohh

let the worries fade away o
CHAKK GILAASI CHAKK GILAASI
let my brothers drink today o
CHAKK GILAASI CHAKK GILAASI
let the worries fade away o
CHAKK GILAASI CHAKK GILAASI
let my brothers drink today o
CHAKK GILAASI CHAKK GILAASI

Jaadu kar gayi oh mere te
Dassa main kinu
Nain shraabi jihde yaaro
Pee gayi menu 

Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Enii sohni enii sohni
Bannke Nikli kyu
Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Enii sohni enii sohni
Bannke Nikli kyu

Sham dhali to nain tere ni
Hor v sohne ho jande ne
Chann v terian siftan karda
Taare pagal ho jande ne
Patlo Banke agg hai firdi
Bijli wangu saade te girdi
cock-tail to vad ke saroor a
matthe te jedi latt a girdi

Aye this friendship
aint meant for
just a drink or two
we're together
aur koi
chahiye hi kyun

Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Enii sohni enii sohni
Bannke Nikli kyu
Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Ain’t nobody Ain’t nobody jaise main Aur tu 

Tere ch dhyaan mera renda sohniye
Dass kinne lakh da ae lehanga sohniye
Nakhre tere te a news ban gayi
Diamond de naal o vad mehanga 
Jado tu nachh diye baby 
Bada hi jach diye baby 
Ya tu pari air shaadi
Ya tu kachh diye aaae baby

Aye this friendship
aint meant for
just a drink or two
we're together
aur koi
chahiye hi kyun

Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Enii sohni enii sohni
Bannke Nikli kyu
Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Ain’t nobody Ain’t nobody jaise main Aur tu

te.title: 🔥 నా చివరి మొబైల్ గేమ్‌ప్లే? | ఫ్రీ ఫైర్ తెలుగు | ధను దినో 🔥
te.description:
🔥 నా చివరి మొబైల్ గేమ్‌ప్లేనా? | ఫ్రీ ఫైర్ తెలుగు | ధను దినో 🔥

మిత్రులారా, ఇది నా చివరి ఫ్రీ ఫైర్ మొబైల్ గేమ్‌ప్లే వీడియో కావచ్చు. 😢

ఈ అద్భుతమైన ప్రయాణంలో నాకు మద్దతు ఇచ్చిన మీ అందరికీ ధన్యవాదాలు. ❤️

ఈ వీడియోలో, మీరు ఉత్కంఠభరితమైన ఫ్రీ ఫైర్ గేమ్‌ప్లే, కీలకమైన క్షణాలు, హెడ్‌షాట్‌లు, గ్లూ వాల్ ఫైట్‌లు మరియు నా మొబైల్ గేమింగ్ ప్రయాణంలోని మరపురాని జ్ఞాపకాలను చూస్తారు.

మా ఇన్‌స్టా :) https://www.instagram.com/telugugamingff07?igsh=NWkydDJqZTg3emVm&utm_source=qr

pa.title: 🔥 ਮੇਰੀ ਆਖਰੀ ਮੋਬਾਈਲ ਗੇਮਪਲੇਅ? | Free Fire Telugu | Dhanu Dino 🔥
pa.description:
🔥 ਮੇਰਾ ਆਖਰੀ ਮੋਬਾਈਲ ਗੇਮਪਲੇ? | ਫ੍ਰੀ ਫਾਇਰ ਤੇਲਗੂ | ਧਨੁ ਡੀਨੋ 🔥

ਦੋਸਤੋ, ਇਹ ਮੇਰਾ ਆਖਰੀ ਫ੍ਰੀ ਫਾਇਰ ਮੋਬਾਈਲ ਗੇਮਪਲੇ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਹੋ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ। 😢
ਇਸ ਸ਼ਾਨਦਾਰ ਯਾਤਰਾ ਦੌਰਾਨ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਮਰਥਨ ਕਰਨ ਲਈ ਤੁਹਾਡਾ ਧੰਨਵਾਦ। ❤️

ਇਸ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਵਿੱਚ, ਤੁਸੀਂ ਤੀਬਰ ਫ੍ਰੀ ਫਾਇਰ ਗੇਮਪਲੇ, ਕਲਚ ਪਲ, ਹੈੱਡਸ਼ਾਟ, ਗਲੂ ਵਾਲ ਫਾਈਟਸ, ਅਤੇ ਮੇਰੇ ਮੋਬਾਈਲ ਗੇਮਿੰਗ ਸਫ਼ਰ ਦੀਆਂ ਅਭੁੱਲ ਯਾਦਾਂ ਦੇਖੋਗੇ।

ਸਾਡਾ ਇੰਸਟਾ :) https://www.instagram.com/telugugamingff07?igsh=NWkydDJqZTg3emVm&utm_source=qr

ml.title: 🔥 എന്റെ അവസാന മൊബൈൽ ഗെയിംപ്ലേ? | Free Fire Telugu | Dhanu Dino 🔥
ml.description:
🔥 എന്റെ അവസാന മൊബൈൽ ഗെയിംപ്ലേ? | ഫ്രീ ഫയർ തെലുങ്ക് | ധനു ഡിനോ 🔥

സുഹൃത്തുക്കളേ, ഇത് എന്റെ അവസാനത്തെ ഫ്രീ ഫയർ മൊബൈൽ ഗെയിംപ്ലേ വീഡിയോ ആയിരിക്കാം. 😢
ഈ അത്ഭുതകരമായ യാത്രയിലുടനീളം എന്നെ പിന്തുണച്ചതിന് നന്ദി. ❤️

ഈ വീഡിയോയിൽ, നിങ്ങൾ തീവ്രമായ ഫ്രീ ഫയർ ഗെയിംപ്ലേ, ക്ലച്ച് നിമിഷങ്ങൾ, ഹെഡ്ഷോട്ടുകൾ, ഗ്ലൂ വാൾ ഫൈറ്റുകൾ, എന്റെ മൊബൈൽ ഗെയിമിംഗ് യാത്രയിലെ മറക്കാനാവാത്ത ഓർമ്മകൾ എന്നിവ കാണും.

ta.title: 🔥 எனது கடைசி மொபைல் கேம்ப்ளே? | Free Fire தெலுங்கு | Dhanu Dino 🔥
ta.description:
🔥 எனது கடைசி மொபைல் கேம்ப்ளேயா? | ஃப்ரீ ஃபயர் தெலுங்கு | தனு தினோ 🔥

நண்பர்களே, இது எனது கடைசி ஃப்ரீ ஃபயர் மொபைல் கேம்ப்ளே வீடியோவாக இருக்கலாம். 😢
இந்த அற்புதமான பயணம் முழுவதும் எனக்கு ஆதரவளித்ததற்கு நன்றி. ❤️

இந்த வீடியோவில், விறுவிறுப்பான ஃப்ரீ ஃபயர் கேம்ப்ளே, முக்கியமான தருணங்கள், ஹெட்ஷாட்கள், குளு வால் சண்டைகள் மற்றும் எனது மொபைல் கேமிங் பயணத்தின் மறக்க முடியாத நினைவுகளை நீங்கள் காண்பீர்கள்.

snippet.title: 🐯 Shinchan's Magic Goes Wrong! Pinchan Becomes a Tiger Man 😱 | Franklin & Shinchan GTA 5 Malayalam
snippet.description:
🐯 Shinchan's magic experiment goes horribly wrong in GTA 5 Malayalam!

During a magic class inspired by Harry Potter, Shinchan tries to perform a powerful spell on Pinchan. But something unexpected happens and Pinchan transforms into a Tiger Man! Frightened and confused, Pinchan escapes into the city.

Franklin and Shinchan begin a huge search operation to find him before it's too late. Meanwhile, Trevor the Hunter discovers Tiger Man Pinchan and captures him to make money by showing him to the public.

Can Franklin and Shinchan rescue Pinchan from Trevor? Will Harry help reverse the spell and bring Pinchan back to normal?

Watch this exciting GTA 5 Malayalam adventure filled with action, comedy, magic, rescue missions, and unexpected twists!

⭐ Characters:
Franklin
Shinchan
Pinchan
Trevor
Harry Potter

🎮 Game: Grand Theft Auto V (GTA 5)

#GTA5Malayalam #FranklinAndShinchan #Shinchan #GTA5 #MalayalamGaming #GTAMalayalam #Franklin #TigerMan #HarryPotter #GamingMalayalam

snippet.description:
కొమురవెల్లి మల్లన్న భక్తి పాటలు 🙏 | Komaravelli Mallanna Folk Songs | Sunday Special Songs 


Telangana Folk Devotional songs
Lyrics: Maddiveni Srinivas


Experience the divine blessings of Lord Mallanna with these powerful Komaravelli Mallanna Bhakti Songs 🙏. These soulful Telugu folk devotional songs are dedicated to Lord Shiva in the form of Mallanna Swamy, worshipped at the sacred Komaravelli temple in Telangana.

🙏 May Lord Mallanna bless you with health, wealth, and happiness.

snippet.title: Sher E Babbar Abbas | Farhan Ali Waris | Nohay 2026 | Muharram | 1448
snippet.description:
Nohay 2026 | Sher E Babbar Abbas | Farhan Ali Waris | Muharram | 2026 | 1448

Syed Farhan Ali Waris Presents " Haider E Karbala Abbas " New Noha 2026 i.e Hazrat Mola Ghazi Abbas Alamdar Noha.

Kalam Details |
Poetry | Mazhar Abidi
Composed by | Own Rizvi
Chorus | Moshin Hashmi, Safdar Kaleem, Meesum Zaidi, Minhal Rizvi
Audio Recording | Meesum Zaidi (LAWA - Studio Karachi)
Audio Mixed & Mastered by | Meesum Zaidi (LAWA Studio Karachi)
Video | The Focus Studio (Safdar Kaleem)
Technical Support | Syed Muhammad Rizvi
Special Thanks | FAW Team & Syed Hassan Ayaz Jaffri, Syed Qamber Ali, Meesum Zaidi, Mohsin Hashmi, Safdar Kaleem Rizvi

يا عباس يا قمر بني هاشم
یا ساقی عطاشا کربلا
یا علمدارِ وفا، یا باب الحوائج
یا أبا الفضل العباس (عليه السلام)

This noha is presented in remembrance of Hazrat Abbas ibn Ali (عليه السلام), the unmatched standard bearer of Karbala and the symbol of loyalty, bravery, and divine obedience. The son of Imam Ali (عليه السلام) and the blessed prayer of Bibi Fatima (سلام الله عليها), and the beloved brother of Imam Hassan (عليه السلام) and Imam Hussain (عليه السلام), Hazrat Abbas stands as the eternal icon of sacrifice in Islamic history.
Known as Alamdar-e-Karbala and Saqqa-e-Sakina, his courage in the battlefield of Karbala reflects absolute devotion to Imam Hussain (عليه السلام). This spiritual Noha expresses grief, love, and respect for the tragedy of Karbala and the unwavering loyalty of Hazrat Abbas (عليه السلام), whose name continues to inspire believers across generations.

#Noha2026 #SherEBabbarAbbas #FarhanAliWaris #Muharram2026 #pakistan 

Syed Farhan Ali Waris Nohay |
